title: Advanced and Strategic Policies on Migration and Development. The
content: 22 Department shall ensure that its policies related to the recruitment and employment of 23 seafarers, as reflected in these rules and regulations and the standards and requirements 24 it imposes, are: 25 26 a. Responsive to current conditions and challenges that have an impact on, or are, in 27 turn, impacted by overseas labor migration and/or the development goals of the 28 Philippine government; 29 30 b. Capable of anticipating and leveraging emerging trends towards the end of 31 ensuring the personal development of overseas workers and their families on the 32 one hand, and the sustainability of our national development on the other; 33 34 c. As far as practicable, supported and guided by evidence-based and data-driven 35 advanced and strategic studies on migration and development; and 36 37 d. Formulated through consultative engagement with key stakeholders and experts 38 in various fields of study, including the participation of government, and non- 39 governmental organizations. 40 41 For this purpose, the Undersecretary for Policy and International Cooperation, through 42 the Institute for Advanced and Strategic Studies on Migration and Development, and the 43 Assistant Secretary for Sea-based OFW Concerns, through the NMP, shall establish the 44 Department’s policy-making framework for overseas deployment of Filipino seafarers. 45 46
